WHO WE ARE

We are a full-service law firm based in Nairobi and Kisumu, offering expert representation in Constitutional, Commercial, Family, Employment and more.

With a strong reputation for professionalism and results, Omanga Law Advocates is commited to delivering strategic, client-centered solutions across Kenya.
